name: James Wansley
bio: James Wansley serves as the Mayor of Whitehouse, a fast-growing community in Smith County located just south of Tyler. The mayor presides over city council meetings and works to maintain the quality of life that makes Whitehouse attractive to families and businesses.
campaignPromises: Manage residential and commercial growth in Whitehouse
Invest in road improvements and infrastructure
Support local schools and community programs
Keep taxes low while maintaining city services
